prompt: Create a full-body character concept art illustration of a steampunk adventurer gunslinger standing upright on a plain white background, centered and facing forward. The character is an androgynous young adult with light blond medium-length tousled hair peeking from under a tall black-and-brown top hat decorated with brass goggles, gears, rivets, leather panels, and a small brass telescope attachment. The face should be intentionally obscured by a smooth featureless beige blur/blank oval with no eyes, nose, or mouth. Outfit: a Victorian steampunk ensemble in dark brown, black, and antique brass, including a long split leather trench coat, fitted double-breasted waistcoat, black high-collar shirt, cravat with a blue gem brooch, layered belts and holsters, pouches at the hip, brass buttons, shoulder armor plates, one mechanical brass gauntlet/prosthetic forearm, black gloves, fitted black trousers with straps, and tall dark leather boots. Pose: confident stance with legs apart, left hand resting on the hip, right arm raised holding one ornate brass flintlock pistol angled upward. Count exactly one visible weapon: the brass pistol. Use polished anime-inspired fantasy character-sheet rendering with crisp linework, detailed leather texture, metallic highlights, symmetrical front-view presentation, soft studio lighting, minimal shadows, no scenery, no text, no watermark.
